title: Legislation Manipulation
description: Buy out public roads using bribery or legislation to put tolls on them or convert to private. Use legal mechanisms to change ownership and access rights. A key path to monopolizing trade routes.
definition-of-done: Legislative action to change road ownership. Bribery path for faster conversion. Legal path slower but safer. Ownership changes reflected in road system.
testing-plan: Verify legislation action works. Test bribery acceleration. Verify legal path timing. Test ownership change integration.
